subject: Centralize waivers in SECCOM repository
commit_message:
Centralize waivers in SECCOM repository

The waivers are in different locations, the idea is
to centralize all the waivers in the same place

Issue-ID: INT-1710

Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: I25ad8ce6f14bb5fd9672139406eb6d3a0720eebb

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

LGTM (I've got only +1 in this repo)

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> LGTM (I've got only +1 in this repo)

For future reviewers - this change collects all of the waiver lists so far:
- waivers/check_certificates/nodeports_xfail.txt comes from integration:test/security/check_certificates/check_certificates
- waivers/jdwp_ports/jdwp_xfail.txt and waivers/nonssl_endpoints/nonssl_xfail.txt come from integration:test/security
- waivers/root_pods/root_pods_xfail.txt comes from integration/xtesting:security/scripts

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> LGTM (I've got only +1 in this repo)

another unsync between INFO.yaml and the LF ldap
only the old committers got the +2
I need to create another ticket..

so other patches to be done once this one is merged
